SQLLite.SQL: SELECT C.CODE As "Code" , C.NAME As "Name" , C.ID As "Id" , C.CASEMAN_INSERVICE As "InService" , C.SUPS_CENTRALISED_FLAG As "SUPSCourt" , CASE WHEN ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COURTS C2 WHERE C2.NAME = C.NAME) > 1) THEN C.NAME || ' ('|| C.CODE ||')' ELSE C.NAME END As "DisplayName" FROM COURTS C WHERE C.CODE NOT IN (0)

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2 ccbcTape admin
